faq.q1Question: How does VisuTry's AI try-on work?
faq.q1Answer: VisuTry combines face guidance, AI glasses try-on, and frame comparison. Upload a portrait, choose a glasses image or preset, and generate realistic previews in your browser.
faq.q2Answer: Frame Compare lets you pick built-in glasses presets and generate side-by-side try-on results from the same photo, so you can compare shape and scale faster.
faq.q3Question: Is my photo data safe and private?
faq.q3Answer: Absolutely. Your photos are encrypted during upload and processing. We never share your images publicly or use them for AI training without explicit permission.
faq.q4Question: How long does it take to generate a try-on?
faq.q4Answer: Most single try-ons complete in about 10-30 seconds. Compare runs frames individually so each result can finish, fail, or retry without blocking the full page.
faq.q5Question: What happens to my try-on history?
faq.q5Answer: Completed results are saved in Dashboard History according to your account retention plan, so you can come back to compare looks later.

faq.q1Title: Is the Credits Pack a subscription?
faq.q1Answer: No. The Credits Pack is a one-time USD 2.99 purchase for {count} AI try-ons. It is designed for occasional users who want to compare glasses without starting a monthly plan.
faq.q2Title: Can I use credits with my own glasses screenshots?
faq.q2Answer: Yes. Credits work with the glasses try-on flow where you upload your face photo and a glasses product image, store image, or screenshot.
faq.q3Title: How many credits does Frame Compare use?
faq.q3Answer: Frame Compare uses one credit per generated frame. A full 4-frame comparison uses up to 4 credits; failed generations are not charged.
faq.q4Answer: Credits never expire after purchase. You can use them anytime at your convenience.
faq.q5Title: What can I do with one free credit?
faq.q5Answer: You can run one face analysis, one custom glasses try-on, or one frame inside Compare. It is designed to let you test the workflow before buying credits.
faq.q6Answer: We support all major credit and debit cards, including Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and more.
faq.q7Answer: You can contact us via email at support@visutry.com. Premium members enjoy priority support.

q1.question: What can I do with VisuTry?
q1.answer: VisuTry helps you choose glasses online with three connected tools: Face Analysis for frame direction, Glasses Try-On for custom product images or screenshots, and Compare for quick side-by-side preset frame previews.

q2.question: Should I start with Face, Glasses, or Compare?
q2.answer: Start with Face if you do not know which frame styles suit you. Use Glasses when you already have a specific product image. Use Compare when you want to test several built-in frame shapes quickly.

q3.question: Do I need to install an app?
q3.answer: No. VisuTry runs in your browser on desktop and mobile.

q1.question: What can I do with one free credit?
q1.answer: You can run one face analysis, one custom glasses try-on, or one frame inside Compare. This gives trial users a real product experience before buying credits.

q2.question: How many credits does Frame Compare use?
q2.answer: Frame Compare uses one credit per generated frame. A full 4-frame comparison uses up to 4 credits. Failed generations are not charged.

q3.question: Is the Credits Pack a subscription?
q3.answer: No. The Credits Pack is a one-time purchase. Purchased credits do not expire.

q1.question: Where can I find completed results?
q1.answer: Generated try-on images and task results are saved in Dashboard History according to your account retention plan.

q2.question: What if a generation takes a long time?
q2.answer: Keep the page open while the task is processing. If it takes longer than usual, you can also check Dashboard History later for completed results.

q3.question: Is my photo private?
q3.answer: Your photo and generated results stay private to your account. VisuTry uses uploaded images to generate your requested analysis or try-on result.

faq.q1Question: Can I try on glasses online from a screenshot?
faq.q1Answer: Yes. VisuTry lets you upload your face photo and a glasses product image or screenshot, then uses AI to create a realistic virtual glasses try-on preview on your face.
faq.q2Question: Can I upload my own glasses image for virtual try-on?
faq.q2Answer: Yes. You can upload a product photo, store image, email screenshot, or a transparent frame image. Clear front-facing product images usually work best.
faq.q3Question: Can I try on glasses at home before buying?
faq.q3Answer: Yes. VisuTry runs in your browser, so you can try on glasses at home from a face photo and compare frame images before deciding what to buy.
faq.q4Question: What if I do not know which glasses to try first?
faq.q4Answer: Start with AI face analysis to estimate your face shape and get frame recommendations, then return to virtual glasses try-on with a better shortlist.
faq.q5Question: How does AI try on glasses work?
faq.q5Answer: AI glasses try-on combines your face photo with a glasses product image or screenshot to generate a preview of the frame on your face. It is most useful after you shortlist styles by face shape, size, and personal taste.
faq.q6Question: Is VisuTry a try on glasses app?
faq.q6Answer: VisuTry works like a try on glasses app, but it runs in your web browser. You can use it on desktop or mobile without installing an app.
faq.q7Question: Can I try on blue light glasses online?
faq.q7Answer: Yes. If you have a clear product image or screenshot of blue light glasses, you can upload it and preview the frame on your face before buying.
faq.q8Question: Do I need to install an app?
faq.q8Answer: No. VisuTry runs in the browser on desktop and mobile. Sign in, upload your photos, and start the glasses try-on flow online.
faq.q9Question: What happens after my free try-on?
faq.q9Answer: You can continue with a Credits Pack: 30 AI try-ons for USD 2.99, no subscription required. Credits do not expire.

valuePoints.p1: AI face shape detector for glasses

table.title: Best glasses by face shape
table.description: If you are asking what glasses suit my face, start with face shape as a first filter. Use these frame directions to build your shortlist, then validate scale and style with virtual glasses try-on.

shapes.roundFrames: Rectangular, square, geometric, and slightly wider frames
shapes.roundReason: Angular lines add definition and help balance softer curves.
shapes.squareFrames: Round, oval, thin metal, and softly curved frames
shapes.squareReason: Curved shapes soften a strong jawline and reduce visual weight.
shapes.ovalFrames: Balanced rectangular, browline, aviator, and classic shapes
shapes.ovalReason: Oval proportions are flexible, so scale and personal style matter most.
shapes.heartFrames: Lightweight, rounded, cat-eye, and bottom-balanced frames
shapes.heartReason: Softer or lifted shapes balance a wider forehead with a narrower chin.

faq.q1Question: What is AI face analysis for glasses?
faq.q1Answer: VisuTry provides AI face analysis for glasses by estimating your face shape and key visible features, then suggesting frame styles before virtual try-on.
faq.q2Question: Can AI recommend glasses for my face shape?
faq.q2Answer: Yes. AI face analysis can recommend frame directions for round, square, oval, heart, diamond, oblong, and triangle face shapes. Use virtual try-on as the final visual check.
faq.q3Question: Can I use a face shape detector online free before buying glasses?
faq.q3Answer: Yes. VisuTry lets you start with an online AI face shape detector so you can understand your likely face shape before choosing glasses. Use the result as a practical shortlist, then confirm the look with virtual try-on.
faq.q4Question: What is a face shape finder for glasses?
faq.q4Answer: A face shape finder estimates whether your face is closer to round, square, oval, heart, diamond, oblong, or triangle, then turns that result into frame styles to try first.
faq.q5Answer: Your uploaded photo and analysis stay private to your account. VisuTry uses the image to generate your face shape report and glasses recommendations.
faq.q6Question: What glasses suit my face shape?
faq.q6Answer: Round faces often start with angular frames, square faces with round or oval frames, oval faces with balanced rectangular or browline frames, and heart faces with lightweight or softly upswept frames.
